root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code as grade, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex , substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),1,30) as age_life_text , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)as id_card, substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,
coalesce((select description from sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status where shareloan_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code ),'[ไม่ระบุ]') as shareloan_code,
( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as salary_amount,
(select position_long from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as position_long,
( case sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status when '1' then ( select concat(sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name, ' ', sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname) from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) else ' ' end ) as spouse_name,
sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, ( case sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status when '0' then 'ปกติ' when '1' then 'งดส่ง' when '2' then 'เปลี่ยนแปลงชำระ' end ) as drop_status, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, --fpa_mobile_get_active(sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone) as telephone sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_member_address where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '004671'

r_amnat_mem_detail_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, ( case sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status when '1' then 'งดทั้งหมด' when '2' then 'งดต้น' when '3' then 'งดดอก' else 'ปกติ' end ) as drop_payment_status, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount as period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period as last_period from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0}

r_amnat_mem_detail_coll_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card where ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) /*WHERE*/

r_amnat_mem_detail_paid.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) as bank_acc_no from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno where 1 = 1 and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_id not in ('000') and membership_no = {0}
